---
name: New plugin source request
about: Request a new job-source plugin
labels: type:plugin
---

## Source name

Name of the job board or API (e.g. "LinkedIn Jobs", "Reed.co.uk").

## Public API URL or documentation link

Link to the official API docs or developer portal. If there is no public API,
explain how you envision the plugin working (e.g. RSS feed, structured HTML).

## Auth requirements

Does the source require an API key, OAuth token, or other credentials? If so,
describe the sign-up process and any access restrictions (rate limits, approval
needed, paid tier only, etc.).

## Approximate listing volume

How many job listings does this source typically return per search? (Ballpark is
fine — e.g. "hundreds", "tens of thousands".)

## Why this source matters

Explain the value this source would add — e.g. unique geography, industry niche,
high volume, free access for open-source projects.

## Are you willing to contribute the plugin?

- [ ] Yes — I can open a PR using the CONTRIBUTING guide.
- [ ] Partially — I can help with testing or review but not the full implementation.
- [ ] No — I am requesting that a maintainer implement it.
